items.headline: Exclusive: Gradial raises $65M for agentic marketing
items.summary: Gradial, a Seattle-based startup that deploys AI agents to automate enterprise marketing workflows, has raised $65 million in Series C funding, CEO Doug Tallmadge exclusively tells Axios.
